sauna.title: Your sauna
sauna.description:
Schvitz Master runs a whole sauna session for you: it warms up, runs each round and break, plays your music, and tidies up at the end.

First, the physical sauna. Only a temperature sensor is required — everything else is optional and can be added later.

data_description.name: What to call this sauna (used for its device and entity names).
data_description.temp_sensor: The main air-temperature sensor. Used for the warm-up wait and the per-session peak-temperature reading.
data_description.seat_temp_sensor: Optional second temperature sensor (e.g. at the bench).
data_description.vent_sensor: Optional damper/vent contact, monitored during a session.

power.title: Power & switches
power.description:
What to switch on when a session starts and off when it ends. All optional — leave blank if you'd rather control power yourself.

Note: Home Assistant can only turn the sauna on or off here; it can't set the thermostat if that's a separate hardwired panel.

data_description.heater_switch: Turned on at session start, off at the end. Often a switch or an input_boolean.
data_description.plug_switch: An extra power outlet to switch with the heater.
data_description.pre_switches: Lights or switches to turn on when the session starts (e.g. sauna lighting).
data_description.post_switches: Switches to turn on when the session ends (e.g. a cool-down fan or outside light).

session.title: Session defaults
session.description:
Defaults for a session. A session is made up of rounds — each round is one time you sit in the sauna, with a cool-down break in between. Two rounds of ~15 minutes is typical.

You can change any of these per session later from the controls, without coming back here.

data_description.default_rounds: How many times you sit in the sauna during one session (the rounds). Usually 2.
data_description.default_round_min: How long each round in the sauna lasts.
data_description.warmup_target_temp: If the warm-up wait is on, the session holds at 'heating' until the sauna reaches this temperature, then starts round 1.

media.title: Music
media.description: Optionally play a playlist through a speaker during the session. Works great with Music Assistant.

data_description.media_player: The speaker to play on (e.g. a Music Assistant player).
data_description.default_playlist: A Music Assistant media id / URI, e.g. library://playlist/84. You can also pick a playlist per session.
data_description.music_start_mode: Whether the music starts as soon as round 1 begins, or earlier — once the sauna warms up to a chosen temperature.
data_description.music_start_temp: Only used when 'when the sauna reaches a temperature' is selected: the music starts the moment the sauna first hits this temperature.

tracking.title: Tracking & notifications
tracking.description: Optionally track what you drink and your heart rate during a session, and get notified at each step. Everything here is optional and any sensor that's missing on a given day is simply skipped.

data_description.water_sensor: Optional. e.g. a smart water bottle. Used to total the water you drink during a session and chart it over time.
data_description.water_source_mode: How to read the water sensor: 'delta' sums increases (a running total bottle), 'absolute' treats the value as the session total.
data_description.hr_sensor: Optional heart-rate sensor; the session records your average and max.
data_description.notify_service: Where to send session notifications (round start, break, complete). Pick a notify service or type one.

abort.already_configured: A sauna with that name already exists.

sauna.title: Your sauna
sauna.description: The physical sauna. Only a temperature sensor is required.

power.title: Power & switches
power.description: Switches to flick at start and end (all optional).

session.title: Session defaults
session.description: A session is made of rounds — each round is one time you sit, with a break in between.

data_description.default_rounds: How many times you sit in the sauna per session. Usually 2.

media.title: Music
media.description: Playlist, speaker, volume, and when the music starts.

options.temp: When the sauna reaches a temperature

next_round.name: Next round
next_round.description: Advance to the next round or break.

extend_round.name: Extend round
extend_round.description: Add minutes to the current phase.

log_water.name: Log water
log_water.description: Manually log water for the session.
